# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio permissive mtls.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-peer-authentication
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: migration-peer-authentication
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    security.istio.io/migration-phase: "temporary"
    security.istio.io/expiry-date: "2024-12-31"
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      migration.istio.io/mtls-mode: "permissive"
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
  portLevelMtls:
    8080:
      mode: STRICT
    8443:
      mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: mtls-migration-policy
  namespace: microservices
data:
  policy: |
    # Migration Policy for mTLS
    # Default: STRICT mode for all services
    # Exception: Services with label migration.istio.io/mtls-mode=permissive
    # Review Date: Monthly
    # Target Completion: 2024-12-31
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default-destination-rule
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: "*.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-plaintext-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        ports: ["8080", "8443"]
  - when:
    - key: connection.sni
      notValues: ["*"]
